zh.Auchterhouse, Angusshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus於1154年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾時，他的父親Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus36歲，母親Margaret Gospatric19歲。他於1169年與Marjory of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1207年12月11日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus于1154年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire福爾法爾时，他的父亲Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus36岁，母亲Margaret Gospatric19岁。他于1169年与Marjory of Scotland在英国苏格兰安格斯奧特豪斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1207年12月11日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Crist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: apparently a nickname from Middle English Crist, Old English Crīst ‘Christ’ (see Christ ), possibly applied as a nickname for someone who played the part of Christ in a pageant.
English: from a pet form of the personal names   Christian   or   Christopher  .
Americanized form of German, Dutch, Czech, or Slovak   Krist   and German or Dutch   Christ  .

variants.name: Crest
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Crist  .

variants.name: Criste
meanings: German and English: variant of   Crist  .

variants.name: Christ
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Fritz, Kurt, Erwin, Franz, Georg, Gerhard, Heinz, Inge, Klaus, Liselotte, Udo.

German and Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Christian , or a nickname meaning ‘the Christian’. In both cases it is (ultimately) from the Latin name Christus ‘Christ’, which is from Greek Christos, a derivative of chriein ‘to anoint’, a calque of Hebrew mashiaḥ ‘Messiah’, which likewise means literally ‘the anointed’. This is the title given to Jesus of Nazareth (see Jesus ), as embodying the fulfilment of Messianic prophecy and expectation; he is the central figure of Christianity and most Christians believe he is the incarnation of God the Son. Compare Chrest , Crist , Ghrist , and Krist .
English: variant of   Crist  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Gille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus was born in 1154, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Gospatric, was 19. He married Marjory of Scotland in 1169, in Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 11 December 1207, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus est né en 1154, à Forfar, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gospatric, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Marjory of Scotland en 1169, à Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1207, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Dunfermline Abbey, Dumfermline, Fife, Sc: Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus 1154 in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Gospatric 19. Er hat 1169 in Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom Marjory of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1207 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus è nato il nel 1154 nel Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gospatric, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Marjory of Scotland nel 1169, nel Auchterhouse, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 dicembre 1207, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angusが1154年にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルで生まれた時，父Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angusは36歳，母Margaret Gospatricは19歳であった。1169年にイギリススコットランドアンガスアウチテローウゼでMarjory of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1207年12月11日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインダンフエルムライン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunfermline Abbey, Dumfermline, Fife, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus(이)가 1154년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gospatric(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1169년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 오트하스에서 Marjory of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1207년 12월 11일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus nasceu em 1154, em Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gospatric, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory of Scotland em 1169, em Auchterhouse, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1207, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunfermline Abbey, Dumfermline, Fife, Sc: дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus родился в 1154 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gospatric, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory of Scotland в 1169 г. в местности аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 декабря 1207 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus nació en 1154, en Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, su papá, Gille Brigte Mac Dufugan 2nd Earl Of Angus, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Gospatric, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Marjory of Scotland en 1169, en Auchterhouse, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1207, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
